chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-152 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh of case 1.For orders on MA 1514/2024 2.For hearing of main case 15-04-2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. ***** Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
